name: cfma-taska
description: CFMA TASKA single-page work calendar, task, email, and Gmail briefing tool.

scripts.check: node --check gmail-analysis-core.js && node --check gmail-scanner-apps-script.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('surveyors-toolbox.html','utf8'); const scripts=[...html.matchAll(/<script(?:\\s[^>]*)?>([\\s\\S]*?)<\\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim()); for (const s of scripts) new Function(s); console.log('inline scripts parsed OK:', scripts.length);"
